series_metadata.series_title: Miscellaneous Data Processing and Computer Usage Files
series_metadata.series_description: Electronic files or automated logs created to monitor computer system usage including but not limited to log-in files, system usage files, data entry logs, and records of individual computer program usage, summary reports and other records creating to document computer usage, copies of records or forms designed or used solely for data input and control when original records are retained elsewhere, documentation of requests for technical assistance, training information, network usage reports

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative or fiscal value to agency, then destroy, Electronic: Erase
